Package org.eventb.core

Class EventBPlugin

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.core.runtime.Plugin
org.eventb.core.EventBPlugin
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.osgi.framework.BundleActivator
public class EventBPlugin extends org.eclipse.core.runtime.Plugin
The Event-B core plugin class.
Since:
1.0

      public static String getComponentName(String fileName)
      Returns the name of the component whose data are stored in the file with the given name.
      Parameters:
      fileName - name of the file
      Returns:
      the name of the component corresponding to the given file

      Returns the name of the Rodin file that contains the context with the given name.
      Parameters:

      Returns:
      the name of the file containing that context

      Returns the name of the Rodin file that contains the checked machine with the given name.
      Parameters:
      bareName - name of the checked machine
      Returns:
      the name of the file containing that checked machine

    • getAutoPostTacticManager

      public static IAutoPostTacticManager getAutoPostTacticManager()
      Return the Auto/Post tactic manager.
      Since:
      2.1

    • getProofManager

      public static IProofManager getProofManager()
      Returns the proof manager of this plug-in.
      Returns:
      the proof manager

    • asEventBFile

      public static IRodinFile asEventBFile(Object object)
      Returns the given object as an event-B file if possible, null otherwise.

      A non-null value is returned iff the given object is an event-B file or adaptable to an event-B file.

      This is a handle-only method. The returned file may or may not exist.

      Parameters:
      object - the object to adapt to an event-B file
      Returns:
      the given object as an event-B file or null

    • asContextFile

      public static IRodinFile asContextFile(Object object)
      Returns the given object as a context file if possible, null otherwise.

      A non-null value is returned iff the given object is a context file or adaptable to an event-B file. In the latter case, the corresponding context file is returned.

      This is a handle-only method. The returned file may or may not exist.

      Parameters:
      object - the object to adapt to a context file
      Returns:
      the given object as a context file or null

    • asMachineFile

      public static IRodinFile asMachineFile(Object object)
      Returns the given object as a machine file if possible, null otherwise.

      A non-null value is returned iff the given object is a machine file or adaptable to an event-B file. In the latter case, the corresponding machine file is returned.

      This is a handle-only method. The returned file may or may not exist.

      Parameters:
      object - the object to adapt to a machine file
      Returns:
      the given object as a machine file or null

    • asSCContextFile

      public static IRodinFile asSCContextFile(Object object)
      Returns the given object as a statically checked context file if possible, null otherwise.

      A non-null value is returned iff the given object is a statically checked context file or adaptable to an event-B file. In the latter case, the corresponding statically checked context file is returned.

      This is a handle-only method. The returned file may or may not exist.

      Parameters:
      object - the object to adapt to a statically checked context file
      Returns:
      the given object as a statically checked context file or null

    • asSCMachineFile

      public static IRodinFile asSCMachineFile(Object object)
      Returns the given object as a statically checked machine file if possible, null otherwise.

      A non-null value is returned iff the given object is a statically checked machine file or adaptable to an event-B file. In the latter case, the corresponding statically checked machine file is returned.

      This is a handle-only method. The returned file may or may not exist.

      Parameters:
      object - the object to adapt to a statically checked machine file
      Returns:
      the given object as a statically checked machine file or null

    • asPOFile

      public static IRodinFile asPOFile(Object object)
      Returns the given object as a proof obligation file if possible, null otherwise.

      A non-null value is returned iff the given object is a proof obligation file or adaptable to an event-B file. In the latter case, the corresponding proof obligation file is returned.

      This is a handle-only method. The returned file may or may not exist.

      Parameters:
      object - the object to adapt to a proof obligation file
      Returns:
      the given object as a proof obligation file or null

    • asPRFile

      public static IRodinFile asPRFile(Object object)
      Returns the given object as a proof file if possible, null otherwise.

      A non-null value is returned iff the given object is a proof file or adaptable to an event-B file. In the latter case, the corresponding proof file is returned.

      This is a handle-only method. The returned file may or may not exist.

      Parameters:
      object - the object to adapt to a proof file
      Returns:
      the given object as a proof file or null

    • asPSFile

      public static IRodinFile asPSFile(Object object)
      Returns the given object as a proof status file if possible, null otherwise.

      A non-null value is returned iff the given object is a proof status file or adaptable to an event-B file. In the latter case, the corresponding proof status file is returned.

      This is a handle-only method. The returned file may or may not exist.

      Parameters:
      object - the object to adapt to a proof status file
      Returns:
      the given object as a proof status file or null

    • getEventPropagator

      public static IPropagator getEventPropagator()

    • getIdentifierPropagator

      public static IPropagator getIdentifierPropagator()

    • simplifyProof

      public static boolean simplifyProof(IPRProof proof, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Attempts to simplify the given proof.
      Parameters:
      proof - a proof to simplify
      monitor - the progress monitor to use for reporting progress to the user. It is the caller's responsibility to call done() on the given monitor. Accepts null, indicating that no progress should be reported and that the operation cannot be cancelled.
      Returns:
      true iff the proof has been successfully simplified
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem accessing the proof
      Since:
      3.0

    • rebuildProof

      public static boolean rebuildProof(IPRProof proof, boolean applyPostTactics, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Attempts to rebuild the given proof.
      Parameters:
      proof - a proof to rebuild
      applyPostTactics - true if post tactics shall be applied in case rebuild does not close the proof tree and post tactics preference is enabled
      monitor - the progress monitor to use for reporting progress to the user. It is the caller's responsibility to call done() on the given monitor. Accepts null, indicating that no progress should be reported and that the operation cannot be cancelled.
      Returns:
      true iff the proof has been successfully rebuilt
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem accessing the proof
      Since:
      2.0

    • recalculateAutoStatus

      public static void recalculateAutoStatus(Set<IPSStatus> statuses, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Updates all given IPSStatus elements by re-running the current auto prover on them.
      Parameters:
      statuses - the IPSStatus elements to update
      monitor - the progress monitor to use for reporting progress to the user
      Throws:
      RodinDBException
      Since:
      3.0

    • runAutoProver

      public static void runAutoProver(Set<IPSStatus> statuses, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Runs the auto prover on the proof obligations associated to the given proof statuses.
      Parameters:
      statuses - the IPSStatus elements from which proof obligations are retrieved
      monitor - the progress monitor to use for reporting progress to the user
      Throws:
      RodinDBException
      Since:
      3.0

    • getProposals

      public static Set<String> getProposals(IAttributeLocation location, boolean waitUpToDate)
      Returns a set of identifier proposals for the given location.
      Parameters:
      location - the location where completion is desired
      waitUpToDate - true iff method call shall be blocked until the underlying indexing system is up to date
      Returns:
      a set of proposals
      Since:
      2.0
